caption:
Mothers don‚Äôt just raise us; they build the generations that come after us. 
My mother is the strength that shaped my sister and me. She held us through many storms, teaching us that goodness is the only thing that truly lasts. She gave our hearts a permanent home and our hands the fortitude we carry wherever we go.
My wife Priyanka is that anchor for our children Vivaan and Ameyaa. It is the same beautiful cycle being repeated in front of me, and this time I get to experience it from the other side. In the way she listens to our children and the kindness she has planted in their hearts, Priyanka is building their future with the love and patience only a mother can.
Then there is my sister, Meghna, who carries our mother‚Äôs light, raising her children Arjun and Shivaan with the same quiet strength and grace so they grow up to be just as kind and strong as she is.
To the woman who made me who I am, and the women shaping the next generation, thank you for everything.
Happy Mother‚Äôs Day to my world.

caption:
Amidst the rapidly shifting tides of the world, we feel deeply grateful for this spirit of stability in the UAE leadership that that has paved the way for us to celebrate such a meaningful launch at @bnw.developments.
This project is a particularly special milestone for BNW Developments as we collaborate with the @fashiontv icon, @micheladamofficial, on our first project in Dubai.

There is a beautiful Japanese proverb that says we all have three faces. The first face, we show to the world. The second face, we show to our close friends and family. But the third face, the truest reflection of who we are, is the one we never show to anyone. ‚Äč

Except, perhaps, our mothers.‚Äč

I remember a time years ago, during one of the darkest chapters of my life. I felt like the walls were closing in. To the world, I was still trying to keep up a brave front, but inside, I was broken.‚Äč

And in that moment of total exhaustion, I did what I‚Äôve always done. I went to my mother. I sat on the floor, put my head in her lap like a little boy, and just cried. I asked her the question we all ask when life feels unfair: "Why me, Ma? Why is this happening to me?"‚Äč

She didn't offer me clich√©s or pity. She simply stroked my hair and asked, "Beta, did you ever ask, 'Why me?' when you were winning all those awards? Did you ask it when millions were cheering your name?"‚Äč

In that simple question, she stripped away the "actor" and the "star" and spoke directly to her son, touching my soul. That is the magic of a mother. She is the only person who can look at your deepest vulnerabilities and use them to rebuild your strength.‚Äč

Now, I see that same magic unfolding in my own home.‚Äč

I watch Priyanka with our children, and I see her getting to know their "third faces" before they even know they have them. It‚Äôs in the way she creates a world for them where they never have to hide who they are.‚Äč

To my mother, who sees me as I truly am; to my wife, who is the heartbeat of our home; and to every mother across the world, thank you for loving every face.‚Äč

Happy Mother‚Äôs Day.

#UAEMothersDay

caption:
Everyone said "NO". Including the man who would later become my mentor, big brother, and now partner ‚ÄĒ Dr. @vivekoberoi 

There was a time when @rutlandsquarespirits was days away from running out of money. The numbers weren‚Äôt great. The balance sheet gave no one a reason to say yes. 

In that phase of desperation, I did what many founders quietly do ‚ÄĒ I sent countless DMs, emails, LinkedIn messages, and pulled every string I possibly could.

Almost everyone said no. Including Vivek bhai. Then, at @baoli.dubai , a common friend said something that changed everything:

‚ÄúHe won‚Äôt see his DMs. You need to reach his core team.‚ÄĚ

I found a connection and asked for just one hour of his time. Nothing more.
7:00 AM at I was summoned at his home. My family went straight to the airport. I had a 2:00 PM flight back to Edinburgh ‚ÄĒ and a very real chance of missing it.

I took the punt. I shared nothing but vision, conviction, and a clear plan.

He looked me in the eye and said:

‚ÄúGreat story. Let‚Äôs make it big.‚ÄĚ

That was the moment everything changed. In past 12 months since we started working together. The doors he has opened, the introductions he has made, and the capital he has helped us raise ‚ÄĒ priceless.

Today, we‚Äôre on track to build a ¬£200m+ whisky and hospitality portfolio, backed by some of the world‚Äôs most exciting LPs and distributors ‚ÄĒ now friends.

The moral?

Tenacity beats timing. Constancy beats rejection. If you don‚Äôt give up on your story, life has a way of making it happen.

As 2025 comes to a close, I wanted to share this personal story ‚ÄĒ one that will resonate with many founders and entrepreneurs.

Because in the end, this story is about one thing: "TENACITY". 

To every entrepreneur out there ‚ÄĒ believe. Keep going.
